summary: Backend-only testing for Laboratory for Multiscale Innovative Technologies API. 18/18 pytest tests passed (100%). All required endpoints (lab-info, research-focus, publications, lab-members, news, contact) work correctly with proper data structure, sorting, filtering, validation, MongoDB persistence, _id exclusion, and CORS configured.

minor.issue: Uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown') instead of FastAPI lifespan context manager. Works but emits deprecation warning in FastAPI.

action_items: Optional: migrate @app.on_event('shutdown') to FastAPI lifespan handler to remove deprecation warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses EmailStr (good), enforces min/max lengths on contact fields (good), excludes _id via projection (good), and uses /api prefix consistently.
Publications endpoint uses `if year:` truthiness check; year=0 would be ignored. Practically not an issue for academic publications.
CORS allow_origins falls back to '*' from env (acceptable for this open public API).
Seed script is idempotent (delete_many before insert_many) - safe to re-run.
Consider adding pagination response wrapper for publications if list grows large; currently returns full list.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: Database was already seeded by main agent via seed_data.py. Test created 1 contact submission with TEST_ prefix and cleaned it up after verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully functional. Public URL: https://materials-lab-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Tests live in /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covering all 6 endpoints + CORS + validation. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v. MongoDB persistence for contact submissions verified manually. _id is properly excluded from all responses.
